headline: Shipper groups ask STB to make key UP-NS merger agreement documents public
summary: Shippers want federal regulators to disclose confidential terms under which Union Pacific could walk away from its proposed merger with Norfolk Southern. The post Shipper groups ask STB to make key UP-NS merger agreement documents public appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: One Big Thing will solve rail’s growth problem, says NS CEO
summary: Norfolk Southern’s Mark George says the acquisition of the railroad by Union Pacific will speed up the movement of freight and spur unprecedented growth across the U.S. rail network. The post One Big Thing will solve rail’s growth problem, says NS CEO appeared first on FreightWaves.
